segment_description: Vernon Circle to Cooyong St (CBD end)
source: VLC/IA Transport Modelling Report 2019 (calibrated Zenith model 2016 base); LR Stage 1 EIS pre-LR baseline ~32000
notes: Pre-LR 6 lanes ~32000 (Capital Metro EIS 2014). Post-LR 4 traffic lanes from 2019. VLC 2019 model shows traffic decrease on Northbourne due to LR. ~22% reduction consistent with PTCBR reported 20% AM peak reduction. Amplifier 6.5x reflects CBD precinct.
CBD ring road. Currently under LR Stage 2A construction (reduced capacity). Amplifier shared with CBD precinct.
East-west connector. No observed count data available. Amplifier shared with CBD precinct.

segment_description: Antill St to Macarthur Ave (Dickson section)
source: VLC/IA Transport Modelling Report 2019 (calibrated Zenith model 2016 base)
notes: Mid-corridor section post-LR. Pre-LR ~28000. VLC 2019 Corridor 1 (Barton Hwy/Northbourne Ave) AM peak hour ~2200 vehicles (Table 7-3) implies ~22000 daily. Amplifier 5x reflects Dickson dining/retail precinct.

segment_description: Antill St to Badham St (Dickson group centre)
notes: Main Dickson precinct frontage. No observed count data in uploaded sources. High ped interaction — parking turnover + dine-in. Amplifier shared with precinct.
East-west arterial. No observed count data in uploaded sources. Amplifier shared with Dickson precinct.
Main town centre street. LR terminus at Hibberson St (Project 41 in VLC 2019 Appendix A: Hibberson Street pedestrian zone). Amplifier 2.5x reflects newer suburban centre.

segment_description: Ernest Cavanagh St to Hibberson St
notes: Ring road around Gungahlin town centre. No observed count data in uploaded sources. Amplifier shared with Gungahlin precinct.

source: VLC/IA Transport Modelling Report 2019 (Zenith model 2016 base); BITRE IS 063 2011-12 Federal Hwy corridor context
notes: VLC 2019 reports moderate traffic decrease on Flemington Rd 2016-2031 due to Gungahlin Drive widening + LR Stage 1. BITRE IS 063 Federal Hwy corridor avg AADT 15173 (2011-12 Table 1; source Roads ACT). Post-Majura Parkway (2014) traffic split reduced Flemington Rd share. VLC 2019 back-calc Federal Hwy 2016 ~10400-10700. Flemington Rd segment higher than Federal Hwy residual due to Gungahlin local traffic. Revised down from 18000.
